step_rationale: Systemic metabolic regulator; associates with atherosclerosis progression but acts off the atherothrombotic cascade.
mechanism: FGF21 is a stress-responsive metabolic hormone linked to atherosclerosis and MI risk through systemic glucose and lipid homeostasis rather than direct plaque-destabilization mechanisms.

references.title: Targeting FGF21 in cardiovascular and metabolic diseases: from mechanism to medicine.
